description: Tests that zoom-out gives a higher-level map of modules and callers using the project's domain vocabulary

tests.prompt: Jag känner inte till scanner.py väl. Zooma ut.
tests.expected_output_description: A map of the relevant modules and their callers, one layer up

assertions.check: Output gives a higher-level overview rather than a line-by-line code reading
Output maps multiple modules and how they relate or call each other
Output uses the project's domain vocabulary (e.g. leads, scan, residential areas, OSM, AI analysis)
Output identifies callers or entry points into the area of code

tests.prompt: Hur hänger scan_city, scan_bbox och scan_buildings_ai ihop?
tests.expected_output_description: Explains the call hierarchy at a high level

assertions.check: Output explains the relationship/hierarchy between the functions rather than dumping their full code
Output describes the overall scan flow these functions participate in
